chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Const. Petition No. S-226 of 2025 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ Directions  For orders as to maintainability of the petition 12.12.2025 Mr. Muhammad Imran, Advocate for the petitioner *********** At the very outset, learned counsel for the petitioner submits the executing Court has allowed the execution application filed by respondent/landlord and the petitioner is no more in possession of the demised premises hence the petition in hand has become infructuous therefore under instructions he does not wish to press it alongwith pending applications. Order accordingly. Head of Const. Benches B-K Soomro
